source.title: What is the reward for enlisting a Ship in Faction Fleet?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “What is the reward for enlisting a Ship in Faction Fleet?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Faction Fleet was the first on-chain gameplay system in Star Atlas, launched in 2021. By enlisting your ships and keeping them resupplied with R4 (Fuel, Food, Ammo, Toolkits), you earn passive ATLAS rewards over time
Looking for Higher Passive Income?
Today, the most rewarding passive income method for your ships is Fleet Rental
Create a fleet in SAGE
List it on the Fleet Rental platform via play.staratlas.com
Other players pay ATLAS to use your ships
You earn rewards while keeping ownership
